mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TEACH_IDX, START_DATE, END_DATE, TEACH_NAME, TEACH_DAY, START_TIME, END_TIME, TEACH_STAGE FROM TEACH WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
AND SUBSTR(START_DATE, 1, 7) <= #{plan_date} AND SUBSTR(END_DATE, 1, 7) >= #{plan_date} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND CALENDAR_VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY START_DATE, END_DATE
SELECT NVL(MAX(TEACH_IDX),0)+1 FROM TEACH
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TEACH ( HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TEACH_IDX, TEACH_NAME, TEACH_DESC, TEACH_ETC, TEACH_STAGE, TEACH_TARGET, LIMIT_HAK, LIMIT_HAK2, CALENDAR_VIEW_YN, TEACH_STATUS, TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT, TEACH_JOIN_UNIT, TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT, TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT, TEACHER_IDX, START_JOIN_DATE, LIMIT_HAK_YN, START_JOIN_TIME, END_JOIN_DATE, END_JOIN_TIME, TEACH_DAY, START_DATE, START_TIME, CANCLE_USE_YN, START_CANCLE_DATE, END_CANCLE_DATE, START_CANCLE_TIME, END_CANCLE_TIME, CANCLE_GUID, APPLY_LIMIT, END_DATE, END_TIME, PRINT_SEQ, TEACH_COUNT,
TYPING_TEACHER_NAME,
PLAN_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE,
IMAGE_PLAN_FILE_NAME, IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, IMAGE_FILE_SIZE,
FAMILY_YN, MEMBER_YN, USE_YN, USE_END_DATE, CERTIFICATE_YN, SURVEY_IDX, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_UNIT, TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_VALUE, family_count_yn, agent_yn, school_info_yn, school_grade_yn, remark_yn, neis_location_yn, neis_cd_yn, neis_training_num_yn, large_category_idx, organization_yn, rank_yn, course_taken_yn, program_classification1, program_classification2, program_classification3, program_subject, program_age_div, adress_yn, black_yn, certificate_name ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{group_idx}, #{category_idx}, #{teach_idx}, #{teach_name}, #{teach_desc}, #{teach_etc}, #{teach_stage}, #{teach_target}, #{limit_hak}, #{limit_hak2}, #{calendar_view_yn}, #{teach_status}, #{teach_limit_count}, #{teach_join_unit}, #{teach_backup_count}, #{teach_offline_count}, #{teacher_idx}, #{start_join_date}, #{limit_hak_yn}, #{start_join_time}, #{end_join_date}, #{end_join_time}, #{teach_day}, #{start_date}, #{start_time}, #{cancle_use_yn}, #{start_cancle_date}, #{end_cancle_date}, #{start_cancle_time}, #{end_cancle_time}, #{cancle_guid}, #{apply_limit}, #{end_date}, #{end_time}, #{print_seq}, #{teach_count},
#{teacher_name},
#{plan_file_name}, #{real_file_name}, #{file_extension}, #{file_size},
#{image_plan_file_name}, #{image_real_file_name}, #{image_file_extension}, #{image_file_size},
#{family_yn}, #{member_yn}, #{use_yn}, #{use_end_date}, #{certificate_yn}, #{survey_idx}, SYSDATE, #{add_id}, #{teach_join_limit_unit}, #{teach_join_limit_value}, #{family_count_yn}, #{agent_yn}, #{school_info_yn}, #{school_grade_yn}, #{remark_yn}, #{neis_location_yn}, #{neis_cd_yn}, #{neis_training_num_yn}, #{large_category_idx}, #{organization_yn}, #{rank_yn}, #{course_taken_yn}, #{program_classification1}, #{program_classification2}, #{program_classification3}, #{program_subject}, #{program_age_div}, #{adress_yn}, #{black_yn}, #{certificate_name} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TEACH SET TEACH_NAME = #{teach_name}, TEACH_DESC = #{teach_desc}, TEACH_ETC = #{teach_etc}, TEACH_STAGE = #{teach_stage}, TEACH_TARGET = #{teach_target}, LIMIT_HAK = #{limit_hak}, LIMIT_HAK2 = #{limit_hak2}, LIMIT_HAK_YN = #{limit_hak_yn}, TEACH_STATUS = #{teach_status},
TEACH_COUNT = #{teach_count},
TYPING_TEACHER_NAME = #{teacher_name},
TEACH_JOIN_UNIT = #{teach_join_unit},
TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT = #{teach_limit_count}, TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT = #{teach_backup_count}, TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT = #{teach_offline_count}, TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx},
START_JOIN_DATE = #{start_join_date},
START_JOIN_TIME = #{start_join_time},
END_JOIN_DATE = #{end_join_date},
END_JOIN_TIME = #{end_join_time},
CANCLE_USE_YN = #{cancle_use_yn},
START_CANCLE_DATE = #{start_cancle_date},
END_CANCLE_DATE = #{end_cancle_date},
START_CANCLE_TIME = #{start_cancle_time},
END_CANCLE_TIME = #{end_cancle_time},
CANCLE_GUID = #{cancle_guid}, APPLY_LIMIT = #{apply_limit}, TEACH_SAME_LIMIT_COUNT = #{teach_same_limit_count},
TEACH_DAY = #{teach_day},
START_DATE = #{start_date},
START_TIME = #{start_time},
END_DATE = #{end_date},
END_TIME = #{end_time},
teach_join_limit_unit = #{teach_join_limit_unit}, teach_join_limit_value = #{teach_join_limit_value},
plan_file_name = #{plan_file_name}, real_file_name = #{real_file_name}, file_extension = #{file_extension}, file_size = #{file_size},
image_plan_file_name = #{image_plan_file_name}, image_real_file_name = #{image_real_file_name}, image_file_extension = #{image_file_extension}, image_file_size = #{image_file_size},
family_count_yn = #{family_count_yn}, agent_yn = #{agent_yn}, school_info_yn = #{school_info_yn}, school_grade_yn = #{school_grade_yn}, remark_yn = #{remark_yn}, neis_location_yn = #{neis_location_yn}, neis_cd_yn = #{neis_cd_yn}, neis_training_num_yn = #{neis_training_num_yn}, organization_yn = #{organization_yn}, rank_yn = #{rank_yn}, course_taken_yn = #{course_taken_yn}, calendar_view_yn = #{calendar_view_yn}, member_yn = #{member_yn}, family_yn = #{family_yn}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, use_end_date = #{use_end_date}, certificate_yn = #{certificate_yn}, survey_idx = #{survey_idx}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE, program_classification1 = #{program_classification1}, program_classification2 = #{program_classification2}, program_classification3 = #{program_classification3}, program_subject = #{program_subject}, program_age_div = #{program_age_div}, adress_yn = #{adress_yn}, black_yn = #{black_yn}, certificate_name = #{certificate_name} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND category_idx = #{category_idx} AND teach_idx = #{teach_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN TO_DATE(A.end_date || ' ' || A.end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < SYSDATE THEN '9' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count > A.teach_join_count THEN '0' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count > A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '1' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count <= A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '5' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_start_date THEN '6' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '2' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '2' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '3' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '99' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '7' WHEN A.status = 1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' END as teach_status, A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.GROUP_IDX, A.CATEGORY_IDX, A.TEACH_IDX, A.TEACH_NAME, A.TEACH_DESC, A.TEACH_ETC, A.TEACH_STAGE, A.TEACH_TARGET, A.LIMIT_HAK, a.LIMIT_HAK2, A.TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT, A.TEACH_JOIN_UNIT, A.TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT, A.TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT, A.START_JOIN_DATE, A.TYPING_TEACHER_NAME, A.TEACHER_IDX, A.START_JOIN_TIME, A.END_JOIN_DATE, A.END_JOIN_TIME, A.TEACH_DAY, A.START_DATE, A.START_TIME, A.END_DATE, A.END_TIME, A.PLAN_FILE_NAME, A.REAL_FILE_NAME, A.FILE_EXTENSION, A.FILE_SIZE, A.MEMBER_YN, A.CERTIFICATE_YN, A.TEACHER_NAME, A.CATEGORY_NAME, A.TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, A.TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, A.TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, A.GROUP_NAME, A.IMAGE_PLAN_FILE_NAME, A.IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, A.IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, A.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE, a.LIMIT_HAK_YN, a.family_count_yn, a.agent_yn, a.school_info_yn, a.school_grade_yn, a.remark_yn, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0020', a.limit_hak) AS LIMIT_HAK_STR, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0020', a.limit_hak2) AS LIMIT_HAK2_STR, a.neis_location_yn, a.neis_cd_yn, a.neis_training_num_yn, a.organization_yn, a.rank_yn, a.course_taken_yn FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND apply_status != '99') as STATUS, (SELECT APPLY_STATUS FROM STUDENT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND apply_status != '99' AND DELETE_YN != 'Y') as APPLY_STATUS, a.HOMEPAGE_ID, a.GROUP_IDX, a.CATEGORY_IDX, a.TEACH_IDX, a.TEACH_NAME, a.TEACH_DESC, a.TEACH_ETC, a.TEACH_STAGE, a.TEACH_TARGET, a.LIMIT_HAK, a.LIMIT_HAK2, a.TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT, a.TEACH_JOIN_UNIT, a.TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT, a.TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT, a.START_JOIN_DATE, a.TYPING_TEACHER_NAME, a.TEACHER_IDX, a.START_JOIN_TIME, a.END_JOIN_DATE, a.END_JOIN_TIME, a.TEACH_DAY, a.START_DATE, a.START_TIME, a.END_DATE, a.END_TIME, a.PLAN_FILE_NAME, a.REAL_FILE_NAME, a.FILE_EXTENSION, a.FILE_SIZE, a.MEMBER_YN, a.CERTIFICATE_YN, a.TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_UNIT, a.TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_VALUE, b.TEACHER_NAME, c.CATEGORY_NAME,d.GROUP_NAME, a.START_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.START_JOIN_TIME REQ_START_DATE, a.END_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.END_JOIN_TIME REQ_END_DATE, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE != 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='2' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE = 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, a.IMAGE_PLAN_FILE_NAME, a.IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, a.IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, a.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE, a.LIMIT_HAK_YN, a.family_count_yn, a.agent_yn, a.school_info_yn, a.school_grade_yn, a.remark_yn, a.neis_location_yn, a.neis_cd_yn, a.neis_training_num_yn, a.organization_yn, a.rank_yn, a.course_taken_yn FROM TEACH a, TEACHER b, TEACH_CATEGORY c, TEACH_CATEGORY_GROUP d WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = c.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = c.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = c.CATEGORY_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = d.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = d.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND a.TEACH_IDX = #{teach_idx} ORDER BY ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.START_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| a.START_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.END_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| a.END_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, a.PRINT_SEQ ASC ) A

SELECT CASE WHEN TO_DATE(A.end_date || ' ' || A.end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < SYSDATE THEN '9' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count > A.teach_join_count THEN '0' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count > A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '1' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count <= A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '5' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_start_date THEN '6' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '1' AND (( A.cancle_use_yn != 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date ) OR ( A.cancle_use_yn = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.start_cancle_date || ' ' || A.start_cancle_time AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.end_cancle_date || ' ' || A.end_cancle_time AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.start_date || ' ' || start_time )) THEN '2' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '1' AND A.cancle_use_yn = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '10' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '2' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '3' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '99' AND A.CANCEL_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '8' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '99' THEN '7' WHEN A.status = 1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' END as teach_status, A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.GROUP_IDX, A.CATEGORY_IDX, A.TEACH_IDX, A.TEACH_NAME, A.TEACH_DESC, A.TEACH_ETC, A.TEACH_STAGE, A.TEACH_TARGET, A.LIMIT_HAK, a.LIMIT_HAK2, A.TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT, A.TEACH_JOIN_UNIT, A.TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT, A.TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT, A.START_JOIN_DATE, A.TYPING_TEACHER_NAME, A.TEACHER_IDX, A.START_JOIN_TIME, A.END_JOIN_DATE, A.END_JOIN_TIME, A.TEACH_DAY, A.START_DATE, A.START_TIME, A.END_DATE, A.END_TIME, A.CANCLE_USE_YN, A.START_CANCLE_DATE, A.START_CANCLE_TIME, A.END_CANCLE_DATE, A.END_CANCLE_TIME, A.CANCLE_GUID, A.APPLY_LIMIT, A.PLAN_FILE_NAME, A.REAL_FILE_NAME, A.FILE_EXTENSION, A.FILE_SIZE, A.MEMBER_YN, A.CERTIFICATE_YN, A.TEACHER_NAME, A.CATEGORY_NAME, A.TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, A.TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, A.TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, A.GROUP_NAME, A.STUDENT_IDX,A.STUDENT_NAME, A.STUDENT_BIRTH, A.STUDENT_SEX, CASE WHEN A.CNT = 0 THEN '2' WHEN (A.ATTEND_CNT/A.CNT)*100 >= 70 AND a.END_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS STUDENT_STATUS, A.IMAGE_PLAN_FILE_NAME, A.IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, A.IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, A.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE, a.family_count_yn, a.agent_yn, a.school_info_yn, a.school_grade_yn, a.remark_yn, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0020', a.limit_hak) AS LIMIT_HAK_STR, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0020', a.limit_hak2) AS LIMIT_HAK2_STR, a.neis_location_yn, a.neis_cd_yn, a.neis_training_num_yn, a.organization_yn, a.rank_yn, a.course_taken_yn FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = e.STUDENT_IDX AND MEMBER_KEY = e.MEMBER_KEY) as STATUS, e.APPLY_STATUS, a.HOMEPAGE_ID, a.GROUP_IDX, a.CATEGORY_IDX, a.TEACH_IDX, a.TEACH_NAME, a.TEACH_DESC, a.TEACH_ETC, a.TEACH_STAGE, a.TEACH_TARGET, a.LIMIT_HAK, a.LIMIT_HAK2, a.TEACH_LIMIT_COUNT, a.TEACH_JOIN_UNIT, a.TEACH_BACKUP_COUNT, a.TEACH_OFFLINE_COUNT, a.START_JOIN_DATE, a.TYPING_TEACHER_NAME, a.TEACHER_IDX, a.START_JOIN_TIME, a.END_JOIN_DATE, a.END_JOIN_TIME, a.TEACH_DAY, a.START_DATE, a.START_TIME, a.END_DATE, a.END_TIME, a.cancle_use_yn, a.start_cancle_date, a.start_cancle_time, a.end_cancle_date, a.end_cancle_time, a.cancle_guid, a.APPLY_LIMIT, a.PLAN_FILE_NAME, a.REAL_FILE_NAME, a.FILE_EXTENSION, a.FILE_SIZE, a.MEMBER_YN, a.CERTIFICATE_YN, a.TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_UNIT, a.TEACH_JOIN_LIMIT_VALUE, b.TEACHER_NAME, e.CANCEL_ID, e.student_name, e.student_birth, e.student_sex, c.CATEGORY_NAME,d.GROUP_NAME, a.START_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.START_JOIN_TIME REQ_START_DATE, a.END_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.END_JOIN_TIME REQ_END_DATE, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE != 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='2' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE = 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEACH_BOOK_TIME WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = e.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = e.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = e.CATEGORY_IDX and TEACH_IDX = e.TEACH_IDX) CNT, (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(status, '1', 1, '2', 1, 0)) - TRUNC(SUM(DECODE(status, '2', 1, 0))/3), 0) FROM TEACH_BOOK WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = e.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = e.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = e.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = e.TEACH_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = e.STUDENT_IDX) as ATTEND_CNT , e.student_idx, a.IMAGE_PLAN_FILE_NAME, a.IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, a.IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, a.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE, a.family_count_yn, a.agent_yn, a.school_info_yn, a.school_grade_yn, a.remark_yn, a.neis_location_yn, a.neis_cd_yn, a.neis_training_num_yn, a.organization_yn, a.rank_yn, a.course_taken_yn FROM TEACH a, TEACHER b, TEACH_CATEGORY c, TEACH_CATEGORY_GROUP d, STUDENT e WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = c.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = c.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = c.CATEGORY_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = d.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = d.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = e.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.GROUP_IDX = e.GROUP_IDX AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = e.CATEGORY_IDX AND a.TEACH_IDX = e.TEACH_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND e.MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND e.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND e.add_date >= TO_DATE(#{searchDateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND e.add_date <= TO_DATE(#{searchDateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND e.apply_status != 99
AND e.apply_status = #{status}
AND e.add_date <= TO_DATE(#{searchDateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
ORDER BY ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.START_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| a.START_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.END_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| a.END_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, a.PRINT_SEQ ASC ) A
SELECT NVL(MAX(PRINT_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TEACH WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT a.TEACH_IDX, b.START_DATE, b.START_TIME, b.END_DATE, b.END_TIME FROM STUDENT a, TEACH b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND a.TEACH_IDX = b.TEACH_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND b.END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd')

SELECT A.* , (SELECT HOMEPAGE_ALIAS FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID) AS HOMEPAGE_ALIAS , (SELECT CONTEXT_PATH FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID) AS CONTEXT_PATH, CASE WHEN TO_DATE(A.end_date || ' ' || A.end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < SYSDATE THEN '9' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count > A.teach_join_count THEN '0' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count > A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '1' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date AND A.teach_limit_count <= A.teach_join_count AND A.teach_backup_count <= A.teach_backup_join_count THEN '5' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_start_date THEN '6' WHEN A.status = 0 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '2' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '2' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '3' WHEN A.status = 1 AND A.apply_status = '99' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_start_date AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < A.req_end_date THEN '7' WHEN A.status = 1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= A.req_end_date THEN '4' END as teach_status FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TEACH_IDX, TEACH_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, TEACH_DAY, TEACH_TARGET, TEACH_DESC, IMAGE_REAL_FILE_NAME, TEACH_STAGE, START_JOIN_DATE, END_JOIN_DATE, teach_limit_count,teach_backup_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND MEMBER_KEY = NULL AND apply_status != '99' AND DELETE_YN != 'Y') as STATUS, (SELECT APPLY_STATUS FROM STUDENT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND MEMBER_KEY = NULL AND apply_status != '99' AND DELETE_YN != 'Y') as APPLY_STATUS, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE != 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='2' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = a.CATEGORY_IDX AND TEACH_IDX = a.TEACH_IDX AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE = 'CMS' GROUP BY TEACH_IDX), 0) AS TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, a.START_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.START_JOIN_TIME REQ_START_DATE, a.END_JOIN_DATE||' '||a.END_JOIN_TIME REQ_END_DATE FROM TEACH a WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE <= TO_DATE(END_JOIN_DATE||''||END_JOIN_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') ORDER BY ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(START_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| START_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(END_JOIN_DATE ||' '|| END_JOIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, PRINT_SEQ ASC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{main_view_count}
mapper.update: UPDATE TEACH SET PLAN_FILE_NAME = '', REAL_FILE_NAME = '', FILE_EXTENSION = '', FILE_SIZE = '' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TEACH_IDX = #{teach_idx}

UPDATE TEACH SET image_real_file_name = '', image_plan_file_name = '', image_file_extension = '', image_file_size = '' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TEACH_IDX = #{teach_idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT homepage_id, teach_idx, cancle_use_yn, start_cancle_date, start_cancle_time, end_cancle_date, end_cancle_time, cancle_guid, sms_flag, apply_limit FROM TEACH WHERE cancle_use_yn = 'Y'
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) - TO_DATE(start_cancle_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE TEACH SET sms_flag = 1 WHERE teach_idx = #{teach_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT wait_num FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS wait_num, teach_idx, member_key FROM ( SELECT member_key, teach_idx FROM STUDENT WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND teach_idx = #{teach_idx} AND apply_status = 2 AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY apply_status ASC, student_idx ASC ) ) WHERE member_key = #{member_key}

SELECT a.teach_name, a.teach_target, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND group_idx = a.group_idx AND category_idx = a.category_idx AND teach_idx = a.teach_idx AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE != 'CMS' GROUP BY teach_idx), 0) AS TEACH_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND group_idx = a.group_idx AND category_idx = a.category_idx AND teach_idx = a.teach_idx AND APPLY_STATUS='2' GROUP BY teach_idx), 0) AS TEACH_BACKUP_JOIN_COUNT, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND group_idx = a.group_idx AND category_idx = a.category_idx AND teach_idx = a.teach_idx AND APPLY_STATUS='1' AND APPLY_TYPE = 'CMS' GROUP BY teach_idx), 0) AS TEACH_OFF_JOIN_COUNT, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.teach_desc, b.teacher_name, a.teach_idx, a.group_idx, teach_limit_count, teach_offline_count, teach_backup_count, (SELECT homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE homepage_id = a.HOMEPAGE_ID) AS homepage_name, (SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN pivot_col = '1' THEN '일' WHEN pivot_col = '2' THEN '월' WHEN pivot_col = '3' THEN '화' WHEN pivot_col = '4' THEN '수' WHEN pivot_col = '5' THEN '목' WHEN pivot_col = '6' THEN '금' WHEN pivot_col = '7' THEN '토' END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pivot_col) FROM (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('1,2,3,4,5,6,7', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) PIVOT_COL FROM DUAL CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR('1,2,3,4,5,6,7', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL) WHERE INSTR(a.teach_day, pivot_col) > 0) AS teach_day_txt FROM TEACH a, TEACHER b, TEACH_CATEGORY c, TEACH_CATEGORY_GROUP d WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id(+) AND a.teacher_idx = b.teacher_idx(+) AND a.homepage_id = c.homepage_id(+) AND a.group_idx = c.group_idx(+) AND a.category_idx = c.category_idx(+) AND a.homepage_id = d.homepage_id(+) AND a.group_idx = d.group_idx(+) AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.delete_yn = 'N'
AND TO_DATE(#{date},'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
ORDER BY ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.start_join_date ||' '|| a.start_join_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC, ABS(SYSDATE - (TO_DATE(a.end_join_date ||' '|| a.end_join_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))) ASC
SELECT homepage_id, group_idx, category_idx, teach_idx, teach_name, token FROM TEACH WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND teach_idx = #{teach_idx}
